verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He will be like rain falling on a field Like showers watering the earth In His days the righteous flourishes Prosperity abounds He will rule from sea to sea

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All kings will bow down to Him All nations will serve the Lord and King He endures as the sun as long as the moon His Majesty will shine through all the world.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praise be to the Lord my God of Israel Had it not been because of You, Who'll be on my side? Praise be to His glorious Name eternally, All of my hope, all of my help, All of my life, because of You.
